title: Installing and Configuring Uniface on iSeries
breadcrumbs: Installing and Configuring Uniface on iSeries
text: Installing and Configuring Uniface on iSeries To install Uniface on iSeries, you need to extract the electronic distribution (e-dist) onto an IFS share. The e-dist is a self-extracting executable that runs on Windows and contains the installation program and all other files needed to install Uniface. The instructions that follow describe how to do this and how to configure Uniface to work with DB2 and, optionally, the web server. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
